name: radar-chart
description: Unified radar chart component supporting all variations: basic, multiple, grid-circle, grid-filled, dots, lines-only, and custom-label configurations

indicators.name: indicators
indicators.description: Array of indicators defining the radar axes. Each indicator should have 'name' (string) and 'max' (number). Example: [{name: 'Sales', max: 6500}, {name: 'Marketing', max: 25000}]

data.name: data
data.description: Data for the chart. Can be single series (number[]) or multiple series (Array<{value: number[], name?: string}>). Example: [4200, 3000, 20000] or [{name: 'Series A', value: [4200, 3000, 20000]}]

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 300

shape.name: shape
shape.description: Shape of the radar grid. Options: 'polygon' or 'circle'. Default: 'polygon'

showSplitArea.name: showSplitArea
showSplitArea.description: Whether to show split area (filled background). Default: false

showSplitLine.name: showSplitLine
showSplitLine.description: Whether to show split lines (grid lines). Default: true

showArea.name: showArea
showArea.description: Whether to show area fill for data series. Default: true

areaOpacity.name: areaOpacity
areaOpacity.description: Opacity of the area fill (0-1). Default: 0.5

showSymbol.name: showSymbol
showSymbol.description: Whether to show symbols (dots) on data points. Default: false

symbol.name: symbol
symbol.description: Symbol type for data points. Options: 'circle', 'rect', 'roundRect', 'triangle', 'diamond', 'pin', 'arrow'. Default: 'circle'

showLine.name: showLine
showLine.description: Whether to show lines connecting data points. Default: true

showLegend.name: showLegend
showLegend.description: Whether to show a legend for multiple series. Default: false

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Colors for the chart series. Overrides theme colors. Example: ['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b']
